name: fiat-crypto-sandbox
postCreateCommand: echo 'IgnoreUnknown UseKeychain' > /tmp/ssh-ignore && cat /home/opam/.ssh/config >> /tmp/ssh-ignore && mkdir -p /home/opam/.ssh-patched && cp /tmp/ssh-ignore /home/opam/.ssh-patched/config && cp /home/opam/.ssh/id_* /home/opam/.ssh-patched/ 2>/dev/null; cp /home/opam/.ssh/known_hosts /home/opam/.ssh-patched/ 2>/dev/null; chmod 700 /home/opam/.ssh-patched && chmod 600 /home/opam/.ssh-patched/*
